differential_diagnoses: Kawasaki disease (including atypical or incomplete forms)
Systemic infection with septic emboli (e.g., Staphylococcus aureus)
next_steps: Initiate empiric intravenous antibiotics (ceftriaxone) pending blood and CSF culture results
Obtain complete blood count, erythrocyte sedimentation rate, C-reactive protein, and procalcitonin
Obtain echocardiogram to evaluate for coronary artery abnormalities
Urinalysis to assess for glomerulonephritis or vasculitis-related renal involvement
Dermatology consultation for skin biopsy (histopathology and direct immunofluorescence)
Inflammatory cytokine panel and SARS-CoV-2 serology/PCR
Liver function tests and albumin levels
